input.command:
python3 -c "
import csv
with open('market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)
active = [r for r in rows if r['is_resolved'] == 'False']
for r in active:
    print(f\"qid={r['qid']} res={r['resolution_date']} title={r['title'][:80]} pred={r['my_prediction'][:80] if r['my_prediction'] else 'NONE'}\")
"
